metadata.title: Wen Quan PhD Application Tracker
metadata.research_positioning: Knowledge-guided vision-language models and lightweight spatial intelligence for age-friendly indoor space assessment and design recommendation.
metadata.public_data_notice: Public tracker data excludes contact emails, private documents, API identifiers, and internal notes.

applications.program_target: PhD in Computer Science / Systems Design Engineering / AI-HCI
applications.research_direction: Human-AI Spatial Intelligence for Age-Friendly Indoor Environment Assessment
applications.funding_route: Funded PhD or assistantship route; verify supervisor funding and school minimum funding.
applications.immigration_route: Strong Ontario route; verify OINP PhD Graduate Stream, PGWP, and Express Entry rules.
applications.next_action: Monitor reply; if positive, send CV, RCN, RP, and confirm funding route.
applications.current_action_from_package: verify supervisor fit, funding deadline, and official immigration pathway before sending.
applications.public_notes: Initial supervisor outreach has been sent. Waiting for reply before formal application.
